merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Ridge Power Bank - 10k mAh - Atomic Purple
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Lightning, USB-C, wireless—every way you need to charge, built into one premium power bank. MagSafe compatibility and built-in cables eliminate the clutter.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Ridge Power Bank - 10k mAh - Atomic Purple, Limited shipping areas , from The Ridge

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Color Picker Sticker Pack
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Designers, photo editors, and colorists live by the color picker. It's the tool that takes your work from good to S-Tier. Now it lives wherever you do. Stick all 8 stickers on anything, match colors everywhere.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Color Picker Sticker Pack, ₫210,840 , from MKBHD

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Production T-Shirt
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Production doesn’t end when the cameras stop rolling. It ends when the work feels complete. Every frame, every decision, every detail matters. This shirt is a nod to mastering a craft, one iteration at a time.

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Deconstructed T-Shirt
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: You might’ve seen our Studio videos in their final forms, but they always start in pieces: fonts, footage, and files all scattered across our editor’s screen. With the right craftsmanship and vision, it starts to take shape. Take another look at this design and you might see something too ;)

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Reverb T-Shirt
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Sound is everywhere, but this Waveform is on a shirt. From the hottest tech news to the latest round of trivia. Grab a dish, your favorite sponge, and listen in.

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Shutter Speed T-Shirt
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Working a manual can be as hard as finding focus while you’re on the move. But, what happens when you have to do both? It’s time to shift things into the next gear.

accessibilityInfo.accessibilityLabel: YouTube Channel Link: Why New Smartphone Cameras Feel Worse

collapsedTitle.simpleText: Marques Brownlee examines upcoming Android 17 features, including agentic Gemini Intelligence tools, redesigned interface elements, and expanded autofill capabilities. The overview also covers a visual overhaul for Android Auto and the introduction of a new generation of Google Book laptops featuring AI-enabled cursor functionality.

text.content: Marques Brownlee examines upcoming Android 17 features, including agentic Gemini Intelligence tools, redesigned interface elements, and expanded autofill capabilities. The overview also covers a visual overhaul for Android Auto and the introduction of a new generation of Google Book laptops featuring AI-enabled cursor functionality.

message.simpleText: Why New Smartphone Cameras Feel Worse

comments.text:
“Hey Gemini I told you to buy 2 concert tickets, and you told me that you did. But I’m here at the venue and it turns out you didn’t buy anything”
Gemini: You’re absolutely right!
